THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOLF, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1771 29TH AVENUE, STAYED UNTIL MAR-31-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT. PAYS PLTF. $200.00 BY 3/9/96, PLTF. WILL STAY EVICTION UNTIL AFTER 3/31/96; AND IF DEFT. PAYS $100.00 BY 3/31/95 PLTF. WILL DISMISS ACTION W/OUT PREJUDICE. (SEE JUDGMENT)
